title: lomatium orientale
intro: Lomatium orientale, also known as Fernleaf Biscuitroot, is a perennial plant native to the dry regions of the western United States and Canada. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of compounds like sesquiterpene lactones and coumarins. The health benefits of Lomatium orientale include its ability to support immune function, reduce symptoms of respiratory infections, and exhibit antiviral properties. Lomatium orientale is typically prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and should be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
